issues.title: Enemy dealt 20 damage (71% of 28 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 238, floor 2 encounter 2, enemy dealt 20 damage when player had 28 HP. This is 71% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 20 damage (71% of player's 28 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 2 with 67.72486772486772% accuracy. Final encounter against stone_sentinel (mini_boss), dealt 123 but took 108 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 68% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (189 cards played, 67.7% accuracy). All 6 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 67.7% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5

issues.title: Difficulty spike: F2E2 took 24 turns (prev floor avg: 8.7)
issues.description: Encounter at floor 2 encounter 2 (stone_sentinel, mini_boss) took 24 turns to resolve, which is 2.8x the previous floor's average of 8.7 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth out enemy stat scaling between floors to avoid jarring difficulty jumps
